# anthropic_workspace_member (Resource)

Adds an existing organization user to a workspace with a given role. The composite ID is `<workspace_id>:<user_id>` (used for import).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "anthropic_workspace_member" "platform_dev" {
  workspace_id   = anthropic_workspace.example.id
  user_id        = data.anthropic_organization_member.alice.id
  workspace_role = "workspace_developer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String) User ID to add. The user must already be an organization member.
- `workspace_id` (String) Target workspace ID.
- `workspace_role` (String) Role: workspace_user, workspace_developer, workspace_restricted_developer, workspace_admin, or workspace_billing (workspace_billing cannot be set at creation — only via update).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID `<workspace_id>:<user_id>`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import anthropic_workspace_member.platform_dev wrkspc_01JwQvzr7rXLA5AGx3HKfFUJ:user_01WCz1FkmYMm4gnmykNKUu3Q
```
